description: Retrieves a list of all available permission level options within a company. The `id` field in the response represents the UUID to be used for `permission_level_id` in API calls related to user permissions.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Returns an array of available permission level options.

items.description: Object representing an available permission level option.

id.description: Unique identifier for the permission level.

name.description: The name of the permission level.
